## How to test

<!-- Steps to verify locally -->

- [ ] `pip install -r requirements.txt`
- [ ] `python app/server.py --demo` — app loads and swipes work
- [ ] (if scraper changed) `python scraper/scrape.py --limit 3`

## Checklist

- [ ] UX change is mobile-friendly
- [ ] No scraped data or image cache committed
- [ ] User-facing text uses `textContent` (no unsafe HTML injection)
